geopolitics_summary: Strait of Hormuz closure elevates crude and LNG supply risk to EU; Iran tensions threaten sustained energy price shocks; US-EU trade tensions loom.

themes.headline: International LNG prices rise amid Strait of Hormuz closure
themes.why_it_matters: Hormuz blockade disrupts LNG supply to Europe; TTF and Asian spot prices decouple, raising European LNG import costs and forcing power-generation fuel switching. Direct impact on gas-fired power margins.

themes.headline: Trump bets on quick Iran oil crunch; experts see prolonged pain.
themes.why_it_matters: Prolonged Iran oil squeeze threatens sustained Brent-WTI premium, raising crude-fired power generation costs across EU. Elevated oil prices support coal-to-gas switching risk; indirect impact on EU power curve and gas demand.

themes.headline: Belgium eyes nuclear takeover to keep reactors running
themes.why_it_matters: Belgian nuclear fleet extension under state ownership reduces gas-for-power demand and thermal fleet utilization; downward pressure on power prices and gas curve (particularly Cal+1). Secular baseload supply addition.

themes.headline: EU floats making it easy for oil companies to break methane rules
themes.why_it_matters: Energy security exemptions from methane rules could loosen upstream supply discipline; indirect signal that EU willing to ease supply constraints if geopolitical crisis deepens. Reduces regulatory floor on gas availability; neutral near-term but hawkish structural risk.

themes.headline: Commission blocks EU funding for Huawei solar tech
themes.why_it_matters: Blocking foreign solar tech funding slows EU renewable capacity additions; delays solar penetration and suppresses off-peak power prices. Indirect, but signals renewable infrastructure risk to power curve if supply chain geopolitics tighten.

watchlist: Hormuz blockade resolution updates — direct LNG and crude supply impact to EU gas prices.
US-EU tariff negotiations (automobiles 25%+) — inflation risk on EU energy transition costs and capex.
Belgian nuclear timeline for state takeover — capacity and gas displacement schedule.
Trump 'Project Freedom' Hormuz mission progress — shipping clearance could ease crude/LNG flow by end-May.
